name: Regulatory Escalation Spiral
description: A pattern where initial regulatory warnings escalate through compliance deadlines to enforcement actions and operational restrictions.

phases.name: Initial Warning
phases.description: Regulator issues warning letter, show-cause notice, or public statement flagging concerns. Company typically downplays severity.

phases.name: Compliance Deadline
phases.description: Formal compliance requirements with specific deadlines. Company announces remediation plans. Market watches for execution.

phases.name: Enforcement Action
phases.description: Regulator takes formal enforcement action: fines, restrictions on new business, mandatory changes to operations or governance.

phases.name: License / Operational Restriction
phases.description: Most severe phase: license revocation, operational shutdown, or forced restructuring. May trigger broader industry regulatory review.
